ctx.name: Darren
ctx.notes: He has been arriving late at work

introQueue.label: What's nourishing
introQueue.name: What's been nourishing in your life recently?
introQueue.description: 'Nourishing' invites what is genuinely sustaining — not just pleasant. No work scope.

introQueue.label: Agenda check
introQueue.name: Before we get into it, anything you want to make sure we cover today?
introQueue.description: Semi-set early question. Gives the report explicit permission to set the agenda before the manager's plan takes over.

introQueue.label: Team connection
introQueue.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
introQueue.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

introQueue.label: Energy read
introQueue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
introQueue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

focus_points.label: Arriving late — pattern or anomaly?
focus_points.reason: Notes mention arriving late at work. Could be a sign of disengagement, personal issues, or just a temporary schedule change — worth clarifying before drawing conclusions.

focus_points.label: Trust and alignment with the board.
focus_points.reason: Role-driven — board/exec relationships are a core CTO surface and a frequent blind spot, especially if something feels off.

focus_points.label: Judgment on strategic tradeoffs recently.
focus_points.reason: Performance and feedback for an exec centres on the calls made, not throughput — judgment is the load-bearing competency.

brief.coreIssue: The 1:1 is likely about Darren's recent pattern of arriving late at work and its implications for his energy and wellbeing as CTO.
brief.openingQuestion: What recent changes in your routine might be affecting your arrival time, and how can I support you in managing these adjustments?
listenFor: whether he mentions a temporary personal situation
if he deflects to workload or external factors
whether he volunteers a recent strategic decision as a stress point
avoid: do not assume disengagement without evidence
do not directly question his commitment to the role
brief.goodOutcome: You and Darren have agreed to monitor his arrival time as an energy signal and to explore flexible arrangements if needed.
brief.suggestedAction: During the 1:1, explore whether a flexible start time could help Darren manage his energy better.

issues: goodOutcome may be too generic — add seniority, role, or level-specific artefact (lead scope, ownership, etc.)
coreIssue does not reference role or seniority — may be too generic
output may not reflect the meeting type distinctly

queueRef.label: Nourishing specifics
queueRef.name: When you say 'food' — what about it has been nourishing? Is it the act of cooking, the meals themselves, or something else?
queueRef.description: Clarifies what specifically about food is nourishing to Darren.

queueRef.label: Energy read
queueRef.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
queueRef.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

queueRef.label: Agenda check
queueRef.name: Before we get into it, anything you want to make sure we cover today?
queueRef.description: Semi-set early question. Gives the report explicit permission to set the agenda before the manager's plan takes over.

queueRef.label: Late arrival observation
queueRef.name: I've noticed you've been arriving late — what's the situation there?
queueRef.description: Explores the reason behind the recent pattern of arriving late.

queueRef.label: Board engagement status
queueRef.name: How are you feeling about your current engagement with the board?
queueRef.description: Gauges Darren's alignment and relationship with the board.

question.label: What's nourishing
question.name: What's been nourishing in your life recently?
question.description: 'Nourishing' invites what is genuinely sustaining — not just pleasant. No work scope.

transcript.note: [SHALLOW] 'Food' lacks specificity on what is nourishing — does not provide insight into wellbeing.

closer.label: Actionable takeaway
closer.name: What's one thing from today's conversation you'll act on?
closer.description: Encourages Darren to identify a concrete next step following the meeting.

notes.text:
What's been nourishing in your life recently?
this is strange question, that body would ask
